expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: Tavily-first then Confluence fallback ordering
expectations.evidence: In result.md the case focus is stated and treated as an explicit Phase 3 contract requirement: "Case focus: Tavily-first then Confluence fallback ordering" and under Contract requirements: "Spawn Tavily-first deep-research requests..." plus "Written research artifacts must explicitly record Tavily-first ordering, and any Confluence usage must be fallback-only with a recorded insufficiency reason from the Tavily pass."

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase3
expectations.evidence: result.md is explicitly organized around Phase 3: it names "Primary phase/checkpoint under test: Phase 3" and frames validation as "What is being validated (Phase 3 contract focus)" with a "Phase alignment check (Phase 3 only)" section concluding "Result: Aligned to Phase 3."
